rulings.Case Title: JESUS THOMAS SOTO VS. PETER LOUIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Mtn For Reconsideration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 18, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANTs PETER LOUIE, VIVIENNE LOUIE's Motion For Reconsideration DENIED. Moving party fails to meet CCP 1008 requirements. Even if the moving party met the requirements, the reconsideration would have been futile in light of Defendants' further breaches of the stipulation. = (501/REQ)
